## Summary

Describe the user-facing or integration-facing change.

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/run-tests.sh`
- [ ] Dry-run integration against a disposable app fixture
- [ ] Apply integration and rerun to confirm idempotency
- [ ] Documentation and schema updated when contracts changed
- [ ] No private keys, credentials, user data, or proprietary app code included

## Security impact

Explain any change to file mutation, signing, feed validation, workflow permissions, or secret handling. Write `None` when not applicable.
